title: Buttery Tortilla Wraps
description: A simple and delicious recipe for a weeknight dinner or snack. Just butter, tortillas, and a few ingredients to make a flavorful wrap.
instructions: 1. In a pan or griddle, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
2. Place a tortilla in the pan and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of it.
3. Add sliced chicken breast on top of the cheese, followed by cucumber, tomato, and lettuce.
4. Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
5. Repeat with the remaining tortillas and filling ingredients.
6. In a separate pan or griddle, melt the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
7. Place the wrapped tortillas in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until the tortillas are crispy and the filling is heated through.
8. Cut the wraps in half and serve immediately.
